subcodes.title: The Power and Value of True Thought Depend upon Its Manifestation in Action: Words spoken on 1911-10-18 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The reality of man is his thought, not his material body. The thought force and the animal force are partners.
subcodes.subjects: @divine philosophy and natural philosophy, @goodly deeds; actions, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @the mind's power of discovery, @knowledge of self, @mind as intermediary between soul and body
